content:
Push the current latest codebase to GitHub now as the source of truth.

Important:
- Include all current implemented changes
- Do not skip any modified files
- Do not leave any local-only changes unpushed

Return:
1. Latest commit hash
2. Exact commit message
3. Confirmation that the following are included in GitHub:
   - guest header globe vs authenticated bell
   - request modal with fixed_days / open_ended
   - requestMode + numberOfDays Firestore payload
   - avatar upload to Cloudinary + Firestore save
incloud android and iso both
